summary: AI Interpretation Layer verification complete. All backend API tests PASSED (16/16). Frontend UI tests PASSED - all three AI interpretation data-testids verified. Live Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration working via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
critical_code_review_comments: philos_ai.py correctly uses emergentintegrations with claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 model
SYSTEM_PROMPT enforces one Hebrew sentence, calm/symbolic/observational tone
All three interpret functions (interpret_action, interpret_field, interpret_profile) are async and handle errors gracefully
server.py integrates AI: field-dashboard (line 6479), daily-answer (line 3832), profile/record (line 7000)
Frontend components correctly display interpretations: GlobalFieldDashboard.js (line 44), DailyOrientationQuestion.js (line 243), ProfilePage.js (line 112)
All AI interpretations use italic gray styling for subtle observational feel
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Interpretation Layer fully functional. Three interpretation points: (1) GET /api/orientation/field-dashboard returns ai_field_interpretation - displayed in GlobalFieldDashboard.js below narrative, (2) POST /api/orientation/daily-answer returns ai_interpretation when action_taken=true - displayed in DailyOrientationQuestion.js, (3) GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record returns ai_profile_interpretation - displayed in ProfilePage.js. All in Hebrew, one sentence, calm/observational tone. Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations.

frontend_ui_tests.test_global_field_dashboard_ai_interpret: PASS - ai-field-interpretation displayed: 'החקירה עולה כמו גל שמביא עמו שברי התאוששות מהעומק.'
frontend_ui_tests.test_profile_page_ai_interpretation: PASS - ai-profile-interpretation displayed: 'הוא פותח שערים, אבל עדיין מחפש את השער שלו עצמו.'
frontend_ui_tests.test_daily_question_ai_interpretation_el: PASS - data-testid exists, shows after action completion

ai_interpretation_samples.field_interpretation_sample: החקירה עולה כמו גל שמביא עמו שברי התאוששות מהעומק.
ai_interpretation_samples.profile_interpretation_sample: הוא פותח שערים, אבל עדיין מחפש את השער שלו עצמו.
ai_interpretation_samples.characteristics: Hebrew, one sentence, calm/symbolic/observational tone, non-deterministic

mocked_apis.note: Real Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent Universal Key (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY)
